system_config.description: COMPLETE MAP v9: All postals, all named roads, full bidirectional network. City grid (200s-500s), suburban (700s), rural north (800s), lake/county north (900s), county east (1100s), Oak Valley south (1200s). Road types: highway=0.6x, arterial=1.0x, local=1.2x, industrial=1.4x, winding=1.6x
